body:
Summary

Fixes the two blockers preventing frontend-backend integration.

## Changes

### CardGame/docker-compose.yml
- Added missing backend environment variables: MONGO_URI, REDIS_URL, JWT_SECRET, JWT_REFRESH_SECRET, JWT_EXPIRES_IN, PORT, CLIENT_ORIGIN
- Added VITE_API_URL to frontend service (needed for PR #55 API layer)
- These were the root cause of the POST /api/auth/login returning 500

### CardGame/frontend/src/router/PrivateRoute.jsx
- Replaced hardcoded localStorage.getItem('token') with a TOKEN_KEY constant to avoid duplication when 	okenUtils.js (PR #55) is merged
- Removed stale PR-number reference from comment

### CardGame/backend/src/index.js
- Translated remaining Chinese inline comments to English (aligns with language convention in docs/language.md)
title: fix: add missing env vars to docker-compose and fix PrivateRoute token key
